---
name: Template Request
about: Suggest a new stack template
title: "feat: add [template-name] stack template"
labels: template-request
---

## Template Name

[e.g., web-nuxt]

## Stack

[e.g., Nuxt 3 + Vue 3 + Tailwind + Supabase]

## Category

- [ ] Web
- [ ] Mobile
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Specialized

## Use Case

Why is this template needed? What does it enable that existing templates don't?

## Key Dependencies

List the main packages/frameworks this template would include.
